recommendations.title: Band of Robbers
recommendations.overview: A comedic thriller that re-imagines Mark Twain's iconic literary characters of "Huckleberry Finn" and "Tom Sawyer" as grown men in current day.

recommendations.title: Tom and Huck

recommendations.title: The Brave Little Toaster
recommendations.overview: A group of dated appliances, finding themselves stranded in a summer home that their family had just sold, decide to seek out their eight year old 'master'.

recommendations.title: Las leyendas: El origen
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Fantasy, Adventure, Family, Horror
recommendations.overview: When a human baby crosses the Eternal Mirror, the portal between the living and the dead opens its path to the beings from the underworld.

recommendations.title: Kiwi!
recommendations.overview: The story of a Kiwi who spends his whole life working towards achieving his dream.

recommendations.title: Abominable
recommendations.overview: A group of misfits encounter a young Yeti named Everest, and they set off to reunite the magical creature with his family on the mountain of his namesake.

recommendations.title: Hilda and the Mountain King
recommendations.genres: Animation, Adventure, Fantasy, Family, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: When Hilda wakes up in the body of a troll, she must use her wits and courage to get back home, become human again — and save the city of Trolberg.

recommendations.title: Fall

recommendations.title: The Boy and the Beast
recommendations.genres: Action, Adventure, Animation, Drama, Family, Fantasy

recommendations.title: Puss in Book: Trapped in an Epic Tale
recommendations.overview: After tumbling into a magic storybook, Puss in Boots must fight, dance and romance his way through wild adventures as he searches for an escape.
